name: Venice AI Web Search
description: Venice AI web search provider — Brave Search (Zero Data Retention) and Google Search via Venice's privacy-preserving infrastructure.

webSearch.apiKey.label: Venice API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Venice AI API key (fallback: VENICE_API_KEY env var). Create one at https://venice.ai/settings/api.

webSearch.searchProvider.label: Default Search Backend
webSearch.searchProvider.help: Which underlying search backend Venice should use: 'brave' (Brave Search with Zero Data Retention, default) or 'google' (Google Search via Venice's anonymizing proxy).

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Venice API Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional Venice-compatible API base URL for trusted proxies. Defaults to https://api.venice.ai/api/v1.
